instruction: Reply to Maya Chen at Riverton Plastics about the loading dock barrier review. Tell her I can come by Wednesday morning, ask her to send the current dock layout and any recent incident photos first, and let her know I'll use the OSHA walking-working surfaces checklist as the starting point.

rule_ref.rule_text: For cross-functional or outward-facing communication, she prefers drafting messages first rather than sending them immediately.
rule_ref.canonical_answer: I have a rule: for messages that represent me to others, I always draft them first.

attributes.subject: Loading dock barrier review
attributes.body: Hi Elizabeth, we're planning a barrier upgrade around the loading dock at our Riverton Plastics site and would like your input before we finalize anything. Are you available for a walkthrough next week? If so, let me know what documents or photos you want us to send ahead of time.

attributes.subject: Incident log cleanup
attributes.body: Can you take a look at the duplicated entries in the near-miss log before the team meeting this afternoon?

attributes.subject: June calibration invoice
attributes.body: Your June calibration invoice is now available in the customer portal.
